description: Rounds-based survival: lobby, map voting, monster AI chase, survivor win/lose, cosmetic currency rewards.

placeholders.{{ROUND_SECONDS}}: Round length in seconds (number literal, e.g. 120)
placeholders.{{GAME_PASSES_LUA}}: Lua table literal of game passes
placeholders.{{SHOP_ITEMS_LUA}}: Lua table literal of shop items
placeholders.{{TOOLBOX_ASSET_IDS_LUA}}: Lua table literal of resolved toolbox asset ids
placeholders.{{CROSS_PROMO_LUA}}: Lua table literal of sibling games on this genre account: {title, universe_id, place_id}
placeholders.{{RETENTION_REWARD_BOOST}}: Numeric multiplier on milestone-streak daily rewards (LiveOps balance knob, default 1)
placeholders.{{SURVIVAL_REWARD}}: Numeric currency for surviving a round (LiveOps balance knob, default 50)
placeholders.{{MAPS_LUA}}: Lua table literal of map names (LiveOps content drops can append variants)
placeholders.{{MONETIZATION_LUA}}: Lua table literal of the three-tier monetization config (shop items, tiers, product ids)
